final:
module top_module(
    input D,
    input CLK,
    input SET_B,
    input RESET_B,
    output reg Q,  // Change Q to output reg type
    output Q_N
wire __Q_N_tmp = ~Q;
assign Q_N = __Q_N_tmp;

    always @(posedge CLK or negedge SET_B or negedge RESET_B) begin
        if (!SET_B) begin
            Q <= 1'b1;
        end else if (!RESET_B) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end

endmodule
